name: OLED Boot Logo
author: joeskolengaden
description: Show a custom company logo and name on the device's 0.96" (128x64 SSD1306) OLED at boot and while idle. Upload any image, add your company name, and the plugin converts it to a monochrome bitmap that FPP's OLED driver draws as the boot/cape logo. No hardware cape required. Works on FPP 5.4 onwards.
